nasb.text: Therefore the chief priests and the Pharisees convened a council, and were saying, “What are we doing? For this man is performing many signs.

esv.text: So the chief priests and the Pharisees gathered the council and said, “What are we to do? For this man performs many signs.

cnv.text: 於是祭司長和法利賽人召開公議會，說：“這個人行了許多神蹟，我們怎麼辦呢？

ccb.text: 祭司长和法利赛人便召开公会会议，说：“这人行了这么多神迹，我们该怎么办呢？

csbs.text: 于是祭司长们和法利赛人召集了议会，说：“这个人行了很多神迹，我们该做什么呢？
